product.name: HealthTwin
product.tagline: Healthcare decision twin for operators and capital stakeholders

scenarioTemplates.label: Reimbursement Cut
scenarioTemplates.summary: Stress-test reimbursement pressure across margin, operations, access, and financing.
scenarioTemplates.defaultRequirement: Simulate how a 7% reimbursement reduction affects provider operations, patient access, lender confidence, and investor sentiment over 30, 90, and 180 days.

scenarioTemplates.label: Staffing Shortage
scenarioTemplates.summary: Model labor pressure, throughput decline, and care-access impact.
scenarioTemplates.defaultRequirement: Simulate how nurse and physician shortages affect labor cost, throughput, patient access, and financing risk over 30, 90, and 180 days.

scenarioTemplates.label: Payer Conflict
scenarioTemplates.summary: Model denials, contract dispute, and public friction effects.
scenarioTemplates.defaultRequirement: Simulate how a payer-provider dispute and rising denials affect revenue realization, care delays, reputation, and lender concern.

scenarioTemplates.label: Adverse Event
scenarioTemplates.summary: Model regulatory attention, patient trust loss, and financial fallout.
scenarioTemplates.defaultRequirement: Simulate how a public adverse event affects regulator response, patient confidence, service-line utilization, and financing options.

scenarioTemplates.label: Expansion / Acquisition
scenarioTemplates.summary: Model execution risk and market reaction around expansion or acquisition.
scenarioTemplates.defaultRequirement: Simulate how a clinic expansion or acquisition changes referral flow, payer posture, investor confidence, and execution risk.

scenarioTemplates.label: Turnaround / Liquidity
scenarioTemplates.summary: Model covenant pressure, turnaround actions, and capital availability.
scenarioTemplates.defaultRequirement: Simulate how a liquidity-constrained provider responds to margin pressure, covenant risk, and operational deterioration.
